CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Nov-09-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Anthony Vaughn.
Luis Molina, Esq. for Plaintiff: Lino A. Magpantay, present, was sworn and examined.
Plaintiff's witness: James Rybeck, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Fountain Earth Corporation as follows:
Principal $107,023.00
Interest $11,847.00
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $292.50, for a total of $121,662.50
Judgment signed in open court.
